data.body:
PLANNING_INTELLIGENCE_LOG

=== Brainstorm Session Summary ===
Session date: 2026-04-10
Skill: /dso:brainstorm
Epic: baff-7163

=== Scrutiny Pipeline Results ===
Gap Analysis: No artifact gaps. Part B surfaced YAML injection + file-existence guard risks (carried to scenario analysis). Part C: 5 uncovered design-notes.md consumers (all read-only; write-back fills existing fields without schema changes — no action required).

Web Research: Skipped (no external integration signals for primary epic; feasibility research run separately in brainstorm Phase 1).

Scenario Analysis: 5 survivors (2 filtered)
- Partial download / partial init leaves corrupt project (high, runtime) → mitigated: main() wrapper + .dso-init-complete sentinel
- Node 20.x keg-only PATH not active in same shell session (high, runtime) → mitigated: explicit PATH injection before npm
- tickets orphan branch missing in fresh clone (high, runtime) → mitigated: pre-created with empty commit in template fork
- sed metacharacter corruption in project name (medium, runtime) → mitigated: project name sanitization
- claude inherits piped stdin from curl pipe (high, runtime) → mitigated: exec < /dev/tty before launching claude
Filtered: enabledPlugins silently ignored (addressed by extraKnownMarketplaces approach in spec + spike story in SC3)

Fidelity Review: Round 2 — all dimensions pass
- Agent Clarity: self_contained=4, success_measurable=4
- Scope: right_sized=5, no_overlap=5, dependency_aware=5, consumer_completeness=N/A
- Value: user_impact=4, validation_signal=4
- Feasibility: technical_feasibility=4, integration_risk=3 (moderate; spike story embedded in SC3)
Revision cycles: 1 (Round 1 had 4 failing dimensions)

Prompt Alignment: Skipped (installer script is not LLM-facing instruction)

=== Complexity Classification ===
Tier: COMPLEX
Qualitative overrides: multiple_personas, external_integration, success_criteria_overflow (8 SCs)
Confidence: high
External boundaries: 4 (GitHub, Homebrew, npm, Claude Code CLI)
Pattern familiarity: medium (common ecosystem pattern, novel to repo)
feasibility_review_recommended: true (already completed during brainstorm scrutiny pipeline)

=== Key Technical Decisions ===
- Option A: Fork + git clone + bash substitution (chosen over nava-platform approach due to simplicity for non-engineers)
- Installer script lives in DSO plugin repo at plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
- Roadmap design-intent write-back is a separate follow-on epic (07c2-6ac0)
- plugin install is necessarily interactive (no --non-interactive flag); mitigated by explicit user instructions + extraKnownMarketplaces pre-baking
- Node version managed via explicit PATH injection (not brew link --force which is session-scoped)

=== Routing ===
COMPLEX → /dso:preplanning
Suggested first story: spike for extraKnownMarketplaces + enabledPlugins combined settings.json approach (verify plugin consent flow triggers on first Claude launch)
